nasb.text: They will walk after the Lord, He will roar like a lion; Indeed He will roar And His sons will come trembling from the west.

esv.text: They shall go after the Lord; he will roar like a lion; when he roars, his children shall come trembling from the west;

cnv.text: 他們必跟隨耶和華； 耶和華要像獅子吼叫； 他一吼叫， 他們就從西方戰戰兢兢而來。

ccb.text: “以色列子民必跟随耶和华， 祂要像狮子一样吼叫。 祂吼叫的时候， 他们要战战兢兢地从西方来。
